title: OP_CHECKSIGADD
description: OP_CHECKSIGADD accumulates signature checks and supports Schnorr multisignature constructions in Tapscript. It simplifies threshold policies compared with legacy CHECKMULTISIG patterns.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Deeper walk-through of the cryptography, scripting, and transaction mechanics behind this topic.

resources.title: BIP 341: Taproot
resources.notes: Defines Tapscript context where OP_CHECKSIGADD is introduced.
